text: Win Prototype Fund support for Aimparency's open Git-native intent infrastructure
description: Apply as Felix Niemeyer, an individual developer resident and taxed in Germany. The formal fit requires being self-employed/freelance during the funded period (or proportionally released from employment); companies cannot receive this funding. Applications for Jahrgang 03 run 1 October-30 November 2026. Proposed project framing: build an open, Git-native intent and dependency protocol/tooling layer for human-AI software collaboration, including inspectable provenance from aims to dependencies and realizing commits. This should be a concrete new software-infrastructure prototype with societal value, user sovereignty, reusable formats, and freely licensed outputs, rather than a request to maintain the existing Aimparency app. Funding target: up to €47.5k solo for six months (up to 950 hours at €50/hour, subject to the current rules).

status.comment: Individual route appears structurally suitable, subject to confirming German residence/tax and self-employment status for the funded period. Prepare in October; target submission by 31 October.
